mapper.insert: INSERT INTO song_play_log (song_id, play_count, play_date, created_at) VALUES (#{songId}, #{playCount}, #{playDate}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE play_count = play_count + VALUES(play_count), created_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO song_play_log (song_id, play_count, play_date, created_at) VALUES
(#{log.songId}, #{log.playCount}, #{log.playDate}, NOW())

INSERT INTO song_play_log (song_id, play_count, play_date, created_at) VALUES
(#{log.songId}, #{log.playCount}, #{log.playDate}, NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE play_count = VALUES(play_count), created_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT song_id AS songId, SUM(play_count) AS playCount FROM song_play_log WHERE play_date = #{playDate} GROUP BY song_id ORDER BY SUM(play_count) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT song_id AS songId, SUM(play_count) AS playCount FROM song_play_log WHERE play_date = #{playDate} GROUP BY song_id ORDER BY SUM(play_count) DESC
